column6:
Fully custom reader hardware with the following features:
- Custom BLE MCU with dedicated OSDP bus
- Custom “time of flight” LIDAR intent sensor
- Default OSDP settings (115200 baud rate)
- Custom-key Desfire enabled
- Custom keyset for Desfire EV2/3

column2: Ignores all W32-4 prox cards with FC: 7
Kastle has a custom BLE FW that doesn't behave like standard WaveLynx BLE FW
